title: Chaetocarpus oblongatus

The Sapindaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants, with over 1,500 species across the globe. Chaetocarpus oblongatus is a member of the Sapindales order, which includes other families such as Anacardiaceae and Burseraceae. Further classification of Chaetocarpus oblongatus would include its classification as a member of the genus Chaetocarpus and the family Sapindaceae at the species level.
